acceptance_criteria.text: `tool_search` remains enabled in the full runtime toolset as the primary discovery mechanism for the deferred ESI surface; the change must not remove `tool_search` or flatten the full ESI catalog into always-on function tools.
proof: src/agent/tools.ts:243 keeps { type: 'tool_search' } in the full tool array.
tests/unit/tools.test.ts asserts the full toolset still contains tool_search and hosted namespaces.

acceptance_criteria.text: Prompt policy in `src/agent/prompts.ts` is softened from mandatory `tool_search` usage to conditional usage: call `tool_search` when endpoint/namespace availability is unknown, not yet loaded, or discovery is needed; avoid unnecessary `tool_search` hops when a suitable tool is already available.
proof: src/agent/prompts.ts:22 changes tool_search guidance to conditional discovery/reuse wording.
src/agent/prompts.ts:57, src/agent/prompts.ts:60, src/agent/prompts.ts:63, and src/agent/prompts.ts:87 update grounding/routing rules to reuse already available endpoints.
tests/unit/prompts.test.ts checks the new wording and rejects the old mandatory phrase.

acceptance_criteria.text: Tool-search contours remain semantically grouped and aligned with OpenAI guidance: namespaces stay meaningful and use-case oriented, deferred-loading semantics are preserved for deferred ESI tools, and namespace descriptions remain clear and concise.
proof: src/eve/esi-catalog.ts:562 maps character affiliation to eve_public_affiliation_lookup.
src/eve/esi-catalog.ts:598 maps character fittings to eve_character_fittings.
src/eve/esi-catalog.ts:666 maps character search to eve_character_search.
src/eve/esi-catalog.ts:830 and src/eve/esi-catalog.ts:842 split public regional market orders/history from authenticated structure market orders.
tests/unit/tools.test.ts asserts the new namespace names, descriptions, and deferred-loading placement.

acceptance_criteria.text: Coverage is added/updated to prevent regression for the new conditional prompt-routing behavior and for the intended tool-surface shape (including that `tool_search` stays present in full mode).
proof: tests/unit/prompts.test.ts updated prompt expectations for conditional tool_search behavior.
tests/unit/tools.test.ts updated namespace-shape assertions for the public/private splits.
Raw outputs show passing targeted unit tests, build, and lint in .agent/tasks/tool-search-routing-hardening/raw/test-unit.txt, raw/build.txt, and raw/lint.txt.

acceptance_criteria.text: If runtime behavior or operator-facing guidance changes, matching repository docs are updated in the same change and evidence references the exact updated doc paths.
proof: ARCHITECTURE.md:44 documents use-case/access-boundary namespace grouping for hosted tool_search surfaces.
ARCHITECTURE.md:105 documents conditional tool_search discovery followed by direct reuse of loaded tools.
evidence.md and raw artifacts in .agent/tasks/tool-search-routing-hardening/ reference the updated docs and verification outputs.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: npm run test -- tests/unit/prompts.test.ts tests/unit/tools.test.ts tests/unit/native-responses.test.ts
known_gaps: Fresh verifier has not run yet.
